steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The prompt states the student wants to “describe the process of relief printing.” Process means the sequential steps or mechanics of how something works.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the right answer
steps.content:
D walks through the actual steps in order: carving an image onto a block, then painting it, then pressing it onto a surface.

The other three focus on supplementary details—materials, artistic context, or incomplete information—rather than explaining how relief printing works.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
